titleStmt.title: SII 29.46: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 46. (A.R. No. 84 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar (No. 5) dugout from the main street in the village.

It states that when Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla (Vikramāditya VI) was ruling over the empire from Kalyāṇa and mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Śankaragaṇḍa bearing the epithet Lattalūra puravarēśvara, was governing Koḷḷipāke-7000, the latter made a stipulation that the nagaras [nakharas] of rājadhāni Koḷḷipāke should pay siddhāya at the rate of one poṇgadyāṇa for each shop per annum. The capital is stated to be under the jurisdiction of perggaḍe Kāvaṇayya and other karaṇas.
It is dated Śaka 999, Pingaḷa, Bhādrapada, śu 5, Sunday corresponding to 1077 A.D., August 26, Saturday (not Sunday).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhu
vanāśraya śrī
pṛthvīvallabha ma
hārājādhi rāja
paramēśvara para
ma bhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyāśraya kuḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīma
tribhuvanamalla
dēvara vijaya
rājya muttarō
ttarābhivṛddhi
pravardhamāna
mācaṁdrā
rkka tāraṁ kalyā
ṇada nelevī

ḍinoḷ sukhasaṁ
kathā vinōdadiṁ
rājyaṁgeyyuttu
mire tatpāda padmā
rādhakaṁ samadhiga
ta paṁcamahā
śabda mahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ lattalū
rppuravarēśvaraṁ
koḷḷipāke gō
vaṁsubhavara dēva
raṭṭa mārttaṇḍaṁ nika
ra kōdaṇḍaṁ māva
na ga(nda)vāraṇa A
ri maṇḍaḷika mada
nivāraṇaṁ ka(ṁ)ṭa
ka prākāruṁ sama
rabayadhīraṁ Īva
nēkarāma biru
daṁka bhīmaṁ mū

ṟu lōkada gaṇḍaṁ
gaṇḍarōḷgaṁ kṣa
triya pavitra
paranārī putraṁ
vairi hvatsallaḥ ni
gaḷaṁkamalla ri
pu bhayaṁkara pa
rākrama sidvigna
nivātasiddhi mai
lāradēva labdhava
raprasāda mṛgama
ḍāmūḍa nāmā
di samasta praśasti
sahitaṁ śrīma
nma hāmaṇḍaḷē
śvaraṁ saṁkaragaṇḍa
rasara koḷḷipā
keyarścāsira ma
nāḷuttaṁ sukasaṁ
kathā vinōdadiṁ
rājyaṁ geyyuttaṁ

saka varṣa 999 ne
ya piṁgaḷa saṁva
tsarada bhādrapada
sudda 5 Ādivāra
daṁdu daṇḍanāya
ka perggaḍe kāvaṇa
yya pramukha karaṇa
sanubhavaneyāḷḍa
śrī rājadhāni koḷḷipā
keya samasta nagara
ke putrunupapātra
ke mācaṁdrārkka tāraṁ sa
lvaṁtāge koṭṭa dharmmava
tthaḷe varṣapratiyoṁ
daṁgaḍiyāḷoṁde gadyā
ṇa ponnu siddāya maṁ
tetu sukhaṁ bāḷvare
kāva maryādeya ta
ppidavargge gaṁgeyalu sā
sira kavileya konda
pāpa . svadattā parada
ttā vāyō harēti va
sundarā śa(ṣa)ṣṭirvvarṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 29.46 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
